step_rationale: Transcription factor driving ischemia-reperfusion injury response; myocardial damage mechanism.
mechanism: KLF5 activation aggravates ischemia-reperfusion injury and cardiomyocyte apoptosis during MI.

references.title: Cardiac ischaemia/reperfusion in pigs and mice increases cardiomyocyte Krüppel-like factor 5 that aggravates tissue injury and remodelling.
